web.title: Central Balance Sheet Office | National Bank of Belgium - NBB
web.description: The National Bank's Central Balance Sheet Office collects the annual accounts of most companies and organisations operating in Belgium.
web.markdown:
[Skip to main content](https://www.nbb.be/en/central-balance-sheet-office#main-content)

# Central Balance Sheet Office

The National Bank’s Central Balance Sheet Office collects the annual accounts of most companies and organisations operating in Belgium.

## Quick links

[Filing](https://filing.cbso.nbb.be/)

[Consult](https://consult.cbso.nbb.be/)

[![](https://www.nbb.be/sites/default/files/styles/ausy_builder_16_9_zero/public/ausy-builder/2025-06/centrale%20des%20bilans%20-%20illustrations%20site%20web%20%28013%2919062023_16_9_3.jpg?h=e699999a&itok=5fHLQQOa)\\
\\
**Preparation and filing**\\
\\
Most legal entities active in Belgium are required to file annual accounts with the National Bank.](https://www.nbb.be/en/central-balance-sheet-office/preparation-and-filing "Preparation and filing")

[![centrale des bilans - illustrations site web ](https://www.nbb.be/sites/default/files/styles/ausy_builder_16_9_zero/public/ausy-builder/2025-10/centrale%20des%20bilans%20-%20illustrations%20site%20web%20%28007%2919062023%20%28c%29%20Patrick%20Van%20den%20Branden%20NBB.jpg?h=88fcda3a&itok=29wLv44j)\\
\\
**Consultation of data**\\
\\
It is possible to consult data contained in annual accounts filed with the Central Balance Sheet Office.](https://www.nbb.be/en/central-balance-sheet-office/consultation-data "Consultation of data")

[![](https://www.nbb.be/sites/default/files/styles/ausy_builder_16_9_zero/public/ausy-builder/2025-06/PIB-BCM_06_2024_Blog_727x330_6.png?h=68c54dbc&itok=rySd-H0q)\\
\\
**Rectification**\\
\\
A legal entity may or must correct its data at its own initiative or at the account/auditor’s request.](https://www.nbb.be/en/central-balance-sheet-office/rectification "Rectification")

## Info

Discover [Infomail No. 57](https://www.nbb.be/en/news-events/news/infomail-nr-57-042026 "Infomail Nr 57 - 04/2026"), the latest communication from the Central Balance Sheet Office.

[Public country-by-country reporting](https://www.nbb.be/en/news-events/news/public-country-country-reporting "Public country-by-country reporting")

**Meet Cybo 2.0!** Our next-generation chatbot is **smarter, more intuitive, and powered by AI**, offering seamless support for **all Central Balance Sheet Office** applications. Fast, intelligent assistance, anytime you need it!

[How much does it cost to file annual accounts?](https://www.nbb.be/en/central-balance-sheet-office/preparation-and-filing/how-and-how-much-pay) [How can I determine the model/template I should use to file annual accounts?](https://www.nbb.be/en/central-balance-sheet-office/preparation-and-filing/what-file/model-selection-tool-0) [FAQ](https://www.nbb.be/en/central-balance-sheet-office/faq-central-balance-sheet-office)

## In this section

[About the Central Balance Sheet Office](https://www.nbb.be/en/central-balance-sheet-office/about-central-balance-sheet-office) [Central Balance Sheet Office news](https://www.nbb.be/en/central-balance-sheet-office/about-central-balance-sheet-office/central-balance-sheet) [Contact the Central Balance Sheet Office](https://www.nbb.be/en/central-balance-sheet-office/central-balance-sheet-office-support)

Hello, my name is Cybo, how can I help you?


Cybo

web.title: Annual report | National Bank of Belgium - NBB
web.description: Each year, the NBB publishes an annual report reviewing recent economic and financial developments in Belgium, Europe and the rest of the world.
web.markdown:
[Skip to main content](https://www.nbb.be/en/publications-research/publications/annual-report#main-content)

[Publications](https://www.nbb.be/en/publications-and-research/publications)

- [Other publications](https://www.nbb.be/en/publications-and-research/publications/other-publications)

- [Topics](https://www.nbb.be/en/publications-research/publications/topics)

- [Authors](https://www.nbb.be/en/publications-research/publications/authors)


# Annual report

The annual report of the National Bank of Belgium (NBB) provides an in-depth analysis of the main economic trends and challenges over the past year.

Each year, the NBB publishes an annual report reviewing recent **economic and financial developments** in Belgium, Europe and the rest of the world.

Below you will find the **two most recent editions**, which can also be ordered as a [hard copy](https://www.nbb.be/en/node/6541/).

**Older annual reports (1851–2009)** are grouped in a separate [archive](https://www.nbb.be/en/publications-research/publications/annual-report/annual-report-archive-1851-2009 "Annual report archive (1851-2009)").

## Latest publications

[Annual report\\
\\
\\
5 Mar 2026\\
\\
Report 2025 - Economic and financial developments](https://www.nbb.be/en/publications-research/publications/all-publications/report-2025-economic-and-financial-developments) [Annual report\\
\\
\\
5 Mar 2026\\
\\
Report 2025 - Detailed statistical tables](https://www.nbb.be/en/publications-research/publications/publications/report-2025-detailed-statistical-tables) [Annual report\\
\\
\\
20 Feb 2025\\
\\
Report 2024 - Economic and financial developments](https://www.nbb.be/en/publications-research/publications/publications/report-2024-economic-and-financial-developments) [Annual report\\
\\
\\
20 Feb 2025\\
\\
Report 2024 - Detailed statistical tables](https://www.nbb.be/en/publications-research/publications/publications/report-2024-detailed-statistical-tables)

[Discover all annual reports](https://www.nbb.be/en/publications-research/publications/all-publications?quick_search=&type%5B677%5D=677)

Since 1999, the Bank has also published an annual [corporate report](https://www.nbb.be/en/about-national-bank/information-investors/corporate-report "Corporate report") on its financial results and activities as a listed company.

### Investor email alerts

To opt-in for investor email alerts, please enter your email address in the field below and select at least one alert option. After submitting your request, you will receive an activation email to the requested email address. You must click the activation link in order to complete your subscription. You can sign up for additional alert options at any time.

At Chubb Limited, we promise to treat your data with respect and will not share your information with any third party. You can unsubscribe to any of the investor alerts you are subscribed to by visiting the ‘unsubscribe’ section below. Equity consists of capital, capital reserves and earnings that remain within the company. These are fully owned by the company and are at its disposal to cover its risks. The better the ratio between equity and debts, the more solvent a company is. A positive equity ratio is important. A negative equity ratio (because of accumulated losses) is a severe warning sign that the continuity of the company may be threatened. | € 173,034,679 | 18 % | € 147,142,540 | 15 % | € 128,458,861 | 0 % | € 128,748,681 | | Gross margin
Section 9900
Gross margin or added value is net sales minus the direct costs of the goods sold. In other words: sales invoices minus purchase invoices. A negative gross margin is a warning sign especially when occurring over several years. It may indicate that the company has insufficient means to cover internal costs like salaries, etc. | € 77,054,491 | 28 % | € 60,158,617 | 14 % | € 52,550,701 | 38 % | € 38,039,113 | | Employees
